channel.title: EcoAI Lab — News & Updates
channel.description: Latest news, awards, and research updates from EcoAI Lab at Hanbat National University.

item.title: KICS Winter Conference 2026 — Undergraduate Paper Award
item.description: Encouragement Prize awarded for "Self-Evolving Four-Layer Normalization Gate for Cost-Efficient Intelligent AICC" at the 2026 KICS Winter Conference.
item.dc:creator: EcoAI Lab

item.title: AAAI 2026 Newsletter — EcoAI Lab Featured
item.description: EcoAI Lab leads research on reinforcement learning and quantum AI-based optimization, featured in the AAAI 2026 Newsletter.
item.dc:creator: EcoAI Lab

item.title: HBNU High-Impact Researcher Award 2026
item.description: Prof. Sangkeum Lee received the High-Impact Researcher Award from Hanbat National University in recognition of outstanding research contributions.
item.dc:creator: EcoAI Lab

item.title: Outstanding Professor Award — Hanbat Innovation Award 2026
item.description: Prof. Sangkeum Lee receives the Outstanding Professor Award in the Research Category of the Hanbat Innovation Award.
item.dc:creator: EcoAI Lab

item.title: Excellence Award — E-Learning Campus Best Practice 2026
item.description: EcoAI Lab receives the Excellence Award at the 2026 E-Learning Campus Best Practice Awards.
item.dc:creator: EcoAI Lab

item.title: ETRI Journal Best Paper Award 2025
item.description: Best Paper Award for "Anomaly detection of smart metering system for power management with battery storage system/electric vehicle" published in ETRI Journal.
item.dc:creator: EcoAI Lab
